photos.cameraOpenFailed: The camera could not be opened in this browser. Choose a photo or use your device camera button.
photos.cameraNotReady: The camera is not ready yet. Try again in a moment.
photos.cameraSaveFailed: This browser could not save the selfie. Choose a photo instead.
photos.faceSearchConsent: I explicitly consent to VTK temporarily creating a biometric face template from this photo to search for me in this album. My selfie and template are deleted after the search.
photos.faceSearchNotConfigured: Face recognition is not configured for this deployment yet.
photos.faceNoMatch: No match found in this album.
photos.faceNoIndexedFaces: This album does not have indexed faces in Immich yet.
photos.faceTimeout: Immich could not process the photo in time. Try again with a clear photo.
photos.faceMultipleFaces: The photo contains multiple faces. Use a photo with exactly one face.
photos.faceFileTooLarge: The uploaded photo is too large.

auth.loginRequiredTitle: Please log in to view this page
auth.loginRequiredBody: You must be logged in before you can view the content on this page.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.intro: Just a few things to fill in and your registration is done. You can always change these later in your account.
onboarding.privacyNotice: We use your name and university email for membership and access. Student number, address, date of birth, personal email, study details and photo are optional and only used for features you choose. Only provide what is needed.
onboarding.privacyLink: Read how VTK uses your data.
onboarding.rNumberHint: Format: r followed by 7 digits, e.g. r0123456.
onboarding.rNumberFromKul: This student number comes from your KU Leuven account and cannot be changed.
onboarding.universityEmailHint: This is your KU Leuven login email.
onboarding.preferenceHint: Which address should we use to contact you?
onboarding.mailIntro: Which categories would you like to receive emails about? Pick as many or as few as you like.
onboarding.photoHint: Optional. If you are on the praesidium or a POC, this picture appears on the relevant page.
onboarding.studyYearHint: Select every year you are taking courses in.
onboarding.programmesHint: Select every programme that applies to you.
onboarding.notAtFaculty: I am not studying at the faculty
onboarding.notAtFacultyHint: Tick this if you are not enrolled in an engineering programme at the faculty. You will not receive Career emails, as those target faculty students.
onboarding.notStudyingHint: Tick this if you have graduated or stopped studying. You stay a member, but drop out of the study-related mailing lists.
onboarding.errorInvalid: Not saved: please check the details you entered.
onboarding.errorRnumberTaken: Not saved: this r-number already belongs to another member.
onboarding.errorAvatarTooLarge: Not saved: your profile picture is larger than 8 MB.
onboarding.errorAvatarFailed: Not saved: your profile picture could not be processed.

confirmStudy.title: Are your studies still up to date?
confirmStudy.intro: At the start of every academic year we ask you to confirm what you are studying. That keeps our mailing lists accurate, so you only get emails that are relevant to you.

mailinglists.title: Mailing lists
mailinglists.intro: Download the members who opted in to each category in their account. The columns are firstname, lastname and email; that address is always the member's preferred one.
mailinglists.careerHint: ZIP with the breakdown per year of study and per programme
mailinglists.syncIntroOn: Lists are pushed to Brevo automatically as soon as a member changes their preferences or study details, with a daily reconciliation as a safety net. No more downloading and importing by hand; the CSV/ZIP below stays as a backup.
mailinglists.syncIntroOff: Not configured yet. Without a Brevo API key (BREVO_KEY) nothing is pushed and you keep relying on the manual CSV download below.
mailinglists.syncPartialToast: Partially synced: one or more lists failed. Try again or check the logs.

info.title: About the member portal
info.lead: The member portal is the part of the VTK website where members and board members sign in to manage the website and internal tools.

sections.heading: What is VTK?
sections.body: VTK, in full Vlaamse Technische Kring, is the student association of the Faculty of Engineering Science at KU Leuven. We have existed since 1920 and organise study, cultural, sports and social activities for the students of civil engineering and civil engineering-architecture.

sections.heading: What does the member portal do?
sections.body: Through the member portal, authorised members manage parts of the website such as the calendar, photo albums, pages, partners and users. Regular visitors do not need this portal: the public website stays freely accessible without signing in.

sections.heading: Signing in with your KU Leuven account
sections.body: You can sign in with your KU Leuven account through the central login service of the Associatie KU Leuven. VTK only receives your name and your verified email address to link you to your existing VTK account. Your password is never shared with VTK.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Do you have questions about the member portal or your account? Contact us at it@vtk.be.

privacy.title: Privacy statement
privacy.lead: This statement explains which personal data VTK processes on the public website, in the member portal, for tickets and reservations, in logistics tools and for optional face recognition.

sections.heading: Who is responsible?
sections.body: VTK, Vlaamse Technische Kring, Studentenwijk Arenberg 6/1, 3001 Heverlee, Belgium, is the controller. For questions, rights requests or withdrawal of consent, contact it@vtk.be.

sections.heading: Which data do we process?
sections.body:
Depending on the features you use, we process:
• account and membership data: name, KU Leuven email, language, r-number, roles and session data
• optional profile data: address, date of birth, personal email, email preferences, study profile and profile picture
• orders and activities: ticket buyer and attendees, answers, payments and refunds, sandwiches, shifts, equipment and van reservations and related notes
• access and security data: card number/name, door events, IP address, browser and technical logs
• photo albums: a selfie and biometric face template, but only when you explicitly consent

sections.heading: Purposes and legal bases
sections.body: We process necessary account, ticket and reservation data to provide the requested service or perform an agreement. Roles, fraud prevention, access control and limited security logs rely on VTK's legitimate interest in operating the association and its systems securely. We retain accounting data where a legal obligation requires it. Mailing categories, optional browser diagnostics and face recognition are used only with consent. You may withdraw consent without affecting earlier lawful processing. VTK does not sell personal data or use it for advertising profiles.

sections.heading: Signing in with your KU Leuven account
sections.body: When you sign in with your KU Leuven account, the login service of the Associatie KU Leuven shares your name and your verified email address with VTK. We use that email address to link you to your existing VTK account. VTK does not receive your password.

sections.heading: Face recognition in photo albums
sections.body: This optional feature is disabled by default. If VTK enables it after a data protection impact assessment, you must explicitly consent before every search. The uploaded selfie and its temporary template are deleted after the search, and a cleanup job removes leftovers within one hour. The album index may contain face templates of people shown in photos; questions, objections or deletion requests can be sent to it@vtk.be. No decision with legal or similarly significant effect is made solely by automation.

sections.heading: Who do we share your data with?
sections.body: We use only parties needed to provide the service: KU Leuven/Associatie KU Leuven for sign-in and card data; our hosting, database, object-storage and email suppliers; Mollie for payments; VTK's managed Immich service for albums; and, only with browser consent, Sentry for diagnostics. YouTube or Vimeo is contacted only when you start external media. The actual suppliers, locations and retention settings are maintained in the processing register. Where data leaves the EEA, VTK must use an adequacy decision or appropriate safeguards such as standard contractual clauses.

sections.heading: How long do we keep your data?
sections.body: Sign-in sessions expire within 30 days. Technical door and access logs are deleted after 12 months by default; raw diagnostic payloads and delivery details are cleaned after 90 days and fraud fingerprints after 30 days. Account and membership details remain while needed for membership and administration. Ticket, reservation and payment data is then deleted or anonymised, except where accounting or other law requires longer retention. Retention periods are periodically enforced by the privacy maintenance task.

sections.heading: Your rights and choices
sections.body: In your account you can correct your profile, download a copy of your data and request deletion. Deletion removes the account and anonymises personal details in transactions VTK must retain for legal, financial or integrity reasons. You may also request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability or object by emailing it@vtk.be. VTK may verify your identity and normally responds within one month. You may complain to the Belgian Data Protection Authority.

sections.heading: Children and changes
sections.body: The services are intended for (prospective) students and members. Where a minor's consent is insufficient under applicable rules, a parent or guardian must act. We update this statement when the service or suppliers change; the date above shows the latest material update.
